name: (b) h2h NET — push. Subjects tie on total net (70 each); no money moves (FR26).
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for the NEW bets engine (engine/bets/). The engine CONSUMES net-per-hole as a GIVEN input (P2 — never re-derives net). The `expected` block is hand-calculated and is the source of truth. SettlementEdge direction: fromPlayerId PAYS toPlayerId. Money in integer cents.
_handCalc: Rick net total = 35 (front) + 35 (back) = 70. Ben net total = 35 (front: 4+4+4+4+4+4+4+3+4) + 35 (back: 4+4+4+4+4+4+3+4+4) ... = 70. Totals are equal (70 = 70) -> the bet is a PUSH (FR26): no winner, no money moves. Zero SettlementEdges. State = push (distinct from settled-with-edges).
